transcript.clean_text: foreign France moved into its 11th day all of the racing live and On Demand on gcn Plus the Peloton was getting ready the day after a huge victory for pale Bilbao a full gas day after the rest date and one in honor of the late genomeda everything checked and double checked right is ready to go a Sprint expected maybe a date for wildfinart to finally pick up its first win in this year's race honey cavanya was one of the home Riders beginning in Claremore but all eyes run Jasper to philipsa who was trying to make it four stage wins in this tour and heading north to Mulan 180 just under kilometers 179.8 to be exact three King of the mountains points but only a point each on offer not too much to dangle in front of potential Breakaway people an intermediate Sprint about a third in the day left and right up and down always a chance for those who were choosing to attack a cooler day a cloudy day and this was the first attack and a first attack that went Andrea Mador matis luvel and Daniel OS they would have wanted more company as they went away among the sunflowers they were there to pick up the Sprint points and take an advantage that didn't ever grow to more than three minutes it was kept in check at 1 30 even less at times as coca and philipsa battle it out for Sprint points those remaining taken by philipsa there was rain on the horizon though a little bit of a forecast of wind too and that meant that with 60ks to go things got a bit nervous what was left of the Breakaway just 30 seconds up the road yombo visma UA Emirates ineos and a few other teams protecting GC interests as Amador then said goodbye to the Breakaway and Daniel OS was trying to hold the rest off the rain got worse the Gap grew again but then he was in sight inside the final 20 kilometers Goss finally caught with 13 and a half kilometers to go and it looked as though we were heading for a bunch Sprint typical rapid approach roundabout after roundabout lefts and rights it wasn't without its obstacles no sign of matchup on the pool at the front this time for albacinda kernick as behind those who weren't involved well out the way were there this time with siren crowd and Rickard and inside the final kilometer what Bernard was still there and ready but so were Jayco and Lula coming to the front with Luka mesquits De La gruner Vegan was poised and ready to go looking for his first win of this year's race Alexander Kristoff was put into a great place as well he launched in the red jersey was trying to come around him Phil Bauhaus was in the mix as well as was cooker as was Peterson but yet again the Jolly Green Giant coming across the line and taking the victory no changes in the GC and Jasper Phillips are taking stage win number four five Sprints in total four Phillips and wins four flat sprints all won by the Belgium quite the tour so far for Jasper philipsa who increases his lead in the green jersey competition and wins as the rain fell on stage 11. Phillips cooker and person top tens Two For Christoph modsato Sagan and fanat another day in the green jersey it's only going to take a disaster to take it off his back with 10 stages to Paris courthouse in second place there's some third fanart and mouse all up in the top five yellow Jersey still on the back of Jonas vinegar 17 seconds the margin between vinegar and pogacho it's 2 40 the Hindi and then you've got Rodriguez on Bilbao in the top five stage 12 is one where the GC Riders will have to be careful but it surely has Breakaway written all over it starting in Juan and heading to Bellville it's country difficult roads Country Roads narrow roads and there is plenty of climbing in there well over 3000 meters and bonus seconds up towards the end a fantastic hectic day in Prospect at the Tour de France and you can watch it all live and On Demand on gcn Plus
